outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility risk: negative GEX in weekly/monthly (-5B combined) amplifies downside moves. 0DTE positive GEX provides short-term stability near spot.
outlook.summary: Price pinned between 655 weekly max pain and 668 gamma flip. Extreme put skew (PCR 1.6-4.0) and bearish sentiment across all expiries. Major resistance at 670 (RESONANCE). Key support at 640-650 zone. Break below 655 triggers acceleration toward 650.

levels.motivazione: Major resistance across all 3 expiries: 0DTE 12,162 | Weekly 10,257 | Monthly 20,791. Aligns with gamma flip zone. Dealers hedge selling here.
Structural support in all expiries: 0DTE 36,291 | Weekly 85,068 | Monthly 98,732. Largest combined OI below spot.
Critical 0DTE gamma inflection point. Spot below = dealers short gamma = volatility amplification. Confluent with 670 wall.
Weekly max pain level. Extreme 0DTE PUT volume (141,491 vol vs 10,082 OI = 14x). High friction zone near spot.
Near-term resistance. 0DTE 12,975 OI + Monthly 8,257 OI. First resistance above spot before 670.
0DTE max pain level. Significant 0DTE PUT OI (26,693) with high volume (66,458). Secondary support confluence.
Extreme 0DTE CALL volume (127,047). Mixed PUT/CALL OI creates dealer hedging friction. Spot proximity increases relevance.
Deep structural support: 0DTE 30,362 | Weekly 107,076 | Monthly 126,341. Catastrophic downside target only.
